articles.headline: Pope Leo urges Trump to end war on Iran
articles.excerpt: Pope Leo XIV has urged US President Donald Trump to find an “off-ramp” from the US and Israel’s war on Iran.

articles.headline: After Strait of Hormuz opens, turmoil would still last months, analysts say

articles.headline: US exempts Gulf of Mexico oil drillers from endangered species protections

articles.headline: EU warns oil and gas prices won’t quickly return to normal after Iran war

articles.headline: Russian tanker reaches Cuba amid critical energy shortage

articles.excerpt: From taxi drivers to tour guides, the collapse of Cuba’s tourism industry has left thousands struggling to get by.

articles.headline: Hegseth ends suspension of US Army pilots who flew near Kid Rock's home
articles.excerpt: President Donald Trump, when asked about the helicopters flying by his friend's house said: "They like Kid Rock. I like Kid Rock."

articles.headline: Woods to 'step away and seek treatment' after crash

articles.headline: More than 70 miners killed in South Sudan as government and opposition…

articles.headline: Kissing a woman's hand can be sexual assault, Spanish court finds

articles.headline: How will the Artemis astronauts go to the toilet in space?

articles.headline: Bitcoin’s $10K range expected to hold until spot traders show up: Data
